snp3.7:3.0.549: Narassa hi sujātassa,ye bhavanti viyañjanā;Sabbe te tava kāyasmiṁ,mahāpurisalakkhaṇā.
snp3.7:3.0.550: Pasannanetto sumukho,brahā uju patāpavā;Majjhe samaṇasaṅghassa,ādiccova virocasi.
snp3.7:3.0.552: Rājā arahasi bhavituṁ,cakkavattī rathesabho;Cāturanto vijitāvī,jambusaṇḍassa issaro.
snp3.7:3.0.553: Khattiyā bhogirājāno,anuyantā bhavantu te;Rājābhirājā manujindo,rajjaṁ kārehi gotama".
snp3.7:3.0.555: "Sambuddho paṭijānāsi,Dhammarājā anuttaro;‘Dhammena cakkaṁ vattemi’,Iti bhāsasi gotama.
snp3.7:3.0.556: Ko nu senāpati bhoto,Sāvako satthuranvayo;Ko te tamanuvatteti,Dhammacakkaṁ pavattitaṁ".
snp3.7:3.0.558: Abhiññeyyaṁ abhiññātaṁ,Bhāvetabbañca bhāvitaṁ;Pahātabbaṁ pahīnaṁ me,Tasmā buddhosmi brāhmaṇa.
snp3.7:3.0.559: Vinayassu mayi kaṅkhaṁ,Adhimuccassu brāhmaṇa;Dullabhaṁ dassanaṁ hoti,Sambuddhānaṁ abhiṇhaso.
snp3.7:3.0.560: Yesaṁ ve dullabho loke,Pātubhāvo abhiṇhaso;Sohaṁ brāhmaṇa sambuddho,Sallakatto anuttaro.
snp3.7:3.0.562: "Imaṁ bhavanto nisāmetha,Yathā bhāsati cakkhumā;Sallakatto mahāvīro,Sīhova nadatī vane.
snp3.7:3.0.564: Yo maṁ icchati anvetu,Yo vā nicchati gacchatu;Idhāhaṁ pabbajissāmi,Varapaññassa santike".
snp3.7:3.0.566: Brāhmaṇā tisatā ime,Yācanti pañjalīkatā;"Brahmacariyaṁ carissāma,Bhagavā tava santike".
